name: Gambas al Ajillo
tagline: Spanish garlic shrimp sizzling in olive oil with chili and sherry
highlight: Tapas-bar classic — ten minutes, no soy, no compromise

hero.alt: Sizzling shrimp in olive oil with garlic and parsley
hero.caption: gambas al ajillo — tapas-bar

healthFacts: Shrimp = lean protein, rich in selenium and iodine.
The garlic-infused olive oil is medicinal-meets-delicious.

steps.title: Salt the shrimp
steps.detail: Pat shrimp dry. Season with salt. Resting 10 min builds flavor; skip if you're hungry.

steps.title: Slow-bloom the garlic
steps.detail: Pour olive oil into a small skillet over medium-low. Add sliced garlic and chili; cook 4 min until garlic just turns pale gold.
steps.tip: If your garlic looks brown, it's about to be bitter. Pull it.

media.alt: Garlic and chili in olive oil
media.caption: slow-bloom the garlic

steps.title: Crank and add shrimp
steps.detail: Crank heat to medium-high. Slide shrimp into the oil; toss 90 sec on each side until just pink.
steps.tip: Overcooked shrimp curls into a tight C; perfect shrimp curls into a J.

steps.title: Sherry and serve
steps.detail: Splash sherry, sprinkle paprika, squeeze lemon. Toss 15 sec. Off heat, scatter parsley. Serve sizzling with bread for the oil.
steps.tip: The garlic oil at the bottom is the prize. Have crusty bread ready.
